title: Chapter 132
content:
Chapter 132

[It was a wonderful world]

[Clean]

[Uncorrupt]

[Joyful]

[But, if I had to talk about one thing in this world that was a curse to me]

[That would be…]

[I couldn’t get it up]

[Beautiful women existed left and right]

[Their features are enough to give me heart attacks]

[Yet…]

[I couldn’t get it up!!!]

[Common sense of this world was something that would be the dream of every guy like me]

[Defenseless women who wouldn’t care who touched them or how they were touched]

[Men who watched their spouses get groped by me]

[Thank me for it]

[Be happy for it]

[It was such a wonderful world]

[Yet…]

‘You couldn’t get it up?’

[I COULDN’T GET IT UP!!!!]

[AAAAAHHHHH!!!!]

[THIS ACCURSED WORLD!!!]

[KILL MEEE!!!]

[KILLLLL MMMEEEEEEEEEEE!!!!]

Seesh…

So, in a cusp, this guy was just a pervert. Well, not just any pervert. A mega pervert.

But…

[The Philosopher’s traits are influencing the user]

[Influence failed]

[It is found that the user possesses even more twisted traits than the Philosopher]

[No change in the user’s personality would occur]

‘So you’re saying I’m an even bigger pervert, huh?’

[Yes]

This fuck…

“Haa…”

I sighed and dismissed the small diss the system threw at me and focused back on the book. While the handwriting was very bad and distorted, the system could read very well and transcribe everything to me.

Sure, this guy was a pervert, but he was also a genius. He spent his life trying to find a cure for his penis. He wanted to get hard. I don’t know how long ago he existed, so I wouldn’t care even if he managed to get it up then, since it wouldn’t affect me now, but I know for a fact that he didn’t manage to fix himself because the system had clearly said that I was the first person in this world to get hard.

His research notes, on the other hand, were something else. They were detailed, they were very thorough, and very… disturbing.

[This one specimen was also a failure]

[Another man of this world was lost]

[They just couldn’t handle the transformation]

[Although I managed to transform their penises, the transformation occurred inside of them for some reason instead of the outside]

[For now, I have thrown the useless ones in a separate pocket dimension]

[But even those who showed progress haven’t managed to transform outside of their bodies]

[I can only wonder why that is]

[Is it because the men of this world are constructed this way?]

[Or is it because of how they are birthed?]

‘Birth…?’

I knew how the people in this world were born, but I hadn’t seen it firsthand yet. This guy seems to know something about it.

[I tried to access the temple where children are born]

[Unfortunately, I couldn’t go in]

[It seems the forces beyond the curtain are trying to stop me]

[Haa…]

[I don’t have enough time to analyze them too]

[If only I knew these beings existed beforehand]

[I could have done something about them]

[Anyway, even the kings of the small nations and even the emperor of the empire cannot help me get in]

[These supernatural beings are a clear contradiction to my beliefs]

[Even if I don’t want to, I have no choice but to accept them]

[The only problem is that even if I do so, I still cannot enter the temples]

[This is the only path left for a scientist like me]

[I vow to have sex even just once before I die]

‘Ahan.’

He sure had big goals. I don’t know about the rest, but this was a true man right here. He didn’t deny his true male nature.

Who cares about world domination?

Who wants power?

All men want is a twat. And the twats of this world were first class.

The poor fella did everything he could in his lifetime, but he died a poor death without being able to fulfill his goals.

The handwriting at the end became very distorted, as if his fingers didn’t have any strength left in them. He had gotten too old.

[For those who come after me, I hope this helps you to achieve your dream]

[If it doesn’t…]

[Then I hope you a painless and immediate death]

Yeah, even I was going to kill myself if there was no cure for my little soldier.

I mean, who would want to live in this wonderful world and be unable to have sex? It would be pure torture. Maybe it was the way of balancing things out. But whatever it was, I couldn’t care less.

This book had no use for me. The formulas and the research notes in it were quite detailed. The philosopher guy had studied the men and women of this world in great detail, even children, to the point that it wouldn’t be wrong to say he discovered everything last thing about them, down to their last atom.

But as I said, this detail was useless to me. I could get hard, so there was no need to continue this research.

But one thing had been bothering me. It was clear that I wasn’t the only one who had come to this world from an outside world. If this guy had come, then who’s to say that there aren’t any others?

What if many others had come before me? What if there are still some in this world? What if they couldn’t use this research?

The monster incident where I discovered dicks on their insides was clearly this guy’s doing. But someone must have released them, to either study them, or use them to enhance this research forward.

There was only one way to get to the bottom of this.

To find the mastermind behind the dungeon incident.

[The philosopher’s study had been implanted in the user’s mind]

[The system has deemed 97% of the information useless]

[3% has been absorbed]

[This dungeon had been cleared]

[All living captives would be released]

[Reward for this dungeon would be granted upon exiting this dungeon]

[The dungeon is collapsing]

[All living entities would be healed completely and transferred outside of the dungeon]

[The system error has been fixed]

[Dungeon Labyrinth of the devoured has been cleared]

[No connected dimensional tears would form in the world of Hesha anymore]

[Would you like to access those pocket dimensions?]

[Dimensional pockets can be visited at any time]

[A new system entry, PD would be created]

[Current entries in the PD section]

[Library of the Philosopher]

[Layer of the sleeping]

[The laboratory of resurrection]

[Each pocket dimension houses its own rewards]

[Please visit them at your own convenience]

[Now teleporting the user out of the dungeon]

Fwoo…

Reading all of the notifications was a drag, to be honest, but only after I read them all did my view change abruptly, and I was outside the dungeon. And in front of me was…

Boing…

A soft pair of tits smashed into me as soon as I was out.

“JACK!!!”

Rayla's voice fell in my ears, full of worry, and I could feel her body trembling.

Heuk…

Heuk…

I could hear sniffling sounds coming from her, and not just her; there were many who were crying.

Mostly my family members.

And I found out the reason why…

“Oh, Jack. Your father… Your father…”

~~

Julian died. Shocking.

To be honest, I didn’t really feel that much sad about his death. Sure, Rayla and the rest were devastated, but I didn’t feel much for the guy, so I didn’t cry or weep like them.

At least not in real. I had to fake it so I wouldn’t seem like a piece of shit. But I’d say I put on a pretty convincing act with how much I wept and called for Julian to come back to life.

Thank goodness he didn’t. Now, Rayla was totally mine.

Hehe…

It was a pity in one way, though. I wanted to have sex with Rayla in front of Julian, and there was also the contemplation of making him suck my cum out of Rayla’s pussy or not.

Haa…

I guess you can’t ask for everything in life.

Anyway, we were on our way back. Our numbers had reduced a lot. Many of Zara’s soldiers and Redford’s soldiers had died.

His knight survived, though, and thanks to him, Sandra survived as well.

Zara’s family was fully alright, and we lost Julian, who was also with Redford’s soldiers.

The conclusion that we all arrived at was very simple from this dungeon. That dungeon was the cause for lord Hector’s death, and also Ruuthhaven’s death was also chalked up to it.

Redford’s knight would testify to that. If Redford were still alive, that is. Even if he wasn’t, we had too many witnesses to claim that was the real story, and aside from me, everyone else was sure of that, even Zara, so it was true for all the world cared.

As for my reward through this expedition, aside from Julian's death, this one was something else. I had never gotten this as a reward before. And I couldn’t be happier.

[Reward for clearing the Labyrinth would now be provided]

~~

Let me know if you find any mistakes. Also, Julian's death may seem sudden, but I saw the perfect chance to get rid of him, so I did. Who knows when another magic dungeon might pop up. Also, it would have been too cliched if hero's family came out of this scot-free. Anyway, let me know what you think about it. And also, I didn't kill Lucas because I have a steamy scene ready in mind for his wedding night with Cassandra. I might also add a sister or Rayla, but that's secondary. Let me know in the comments about that too.

That's it, Enjoy.
